2024-10-31T06:04:00.CONTENT_EN: As informed by Mainland Railway Authorities, some High Speed Rail train services between 31 Oct 2024 to 1 Nov 2024 traveling between Hong Kong West Kowloon Station and Mainland have been cancelled due to expected adverse weather conditions. 31 Oct 2024 Cancelled train services: To Fuzhou Station: G3002 1 Nov 2024 Cancelled train services: From Fuzhou Station : G3001 For latest train schedules, please refer to 12306 official website (12306. cn) or click the mobile app. You may also check latest train information from the HSR website, mobile app or the information available at Hong Kong West Kowloon Station. You may consider travel on the East Rail Line to Lo Wu/ Lok Ma Chau or use other transports to enter the Mainland. Ticket refunds should be processed within 30 days. Please use the 12306 official website (12306. cn) or mobile app and avoid coming to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station.
2024-10-31T06:04:00.CONTENT_CN: 內地鐵路單位通報，由於預期天氣情況惡劣，2024年10月31日及2024年11月1日，部分來往香港西九龍站及内地的高速鐵路列車車次取消。 2024年10月31日 已取消的車次: 前往福州站:G3002 2024年11月1日 已取消的車次: 由福州站出發:G3001 有關車次的資料，請留意12306官方網站(12306.cn)，如已安裝手機應用程式，可按「車站大屏」頁面。您亦可留意於高速鐵路網頁、手機應用程式或香港西九龍站發放的最新資訊。 您可考慮乘搭東鐵綫經羅湖/落馬洲，或使用其他跨境交通工具前往內地。 如需退票，您可在30天內辦理。請盡量使用12306官方網站(12306.cn)或手機應用程式，不用急於到香港西九龍站辦理。

2024-11-01T02:07:00.CONTENT_EN:
As informed by Mainland Railway Authorities, the following High Speed Rail train service on 1 Nov 2024 traveling between Hong Kong West Kowloon Station and Mainland has been cancelled due to expected adverse weather conditions. 

Cancelled train service:
From Fuzhou Station: G3001

For latest train schedules, please refer to 12306 official website (12306. cn) or click the mobile app. You may also check latest train information from the HSR website, mobile app or the information available at Hong Kong West Kowloon Station. 

You may consider travel on the East Rail Line to Lo Wu/ Lok Ma Chau or use other transports to enter the Mainland. 

Ticket refunds should be processed within 30 days. Please use the 12306 official website (12306. cn) or mobile app and avoid coming to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station.
2024-11-01T02:07:00.CONTENT_CN:
內地鐵路單位通報，由於預期天氣情況惡劣，2024年11月1日，以下來往香港西九龍站及内地的高速鐵路列車車次取消。

已取消的車次:
由福州站出發:G3001

有關車次的資料，請留意12306官方網站(12306.cn)，如已安裝手機應用程式，可按「車站大屏」頁面。您亦可留意於高速鐵路網頁、手機應用程式或香港西九龍站發放的最新資訊。

您可考慮乘搭東鐵綫經羅湖/落馬洲，或使用其他跨境交通工具前往內地。

如需退票，您可在30天內辦理。請盡量使用12306官方網站(12306.cn)或手機應用程式，不用急於到香港西九龍站辦理。

2024-11-01T00:00:00.CONTENT_EN: To facilitate the 2024 Sha Tin Cycling Festival, relevant Yuen Wo Road southbound, Fo Tan Road westbound, Tai Chung Kiu Road northbound and Sha Tin Rural Committee Road eastbound will be closed to all vehicular traffic from 4.00 am to 11.45 am on 3 November 2024 (Sunday). During the road closure period, motorists should pay attention to the traffic diversion arrangement via road configuration, directional signs, traffic signs and road marking. Public transport services will also be adjusted. For details, please refer to the relevant traffic notice (https://www. td. gov. hk/en/traffic_notices/index_id_77780. html).
2024-11-01T00:00:00.CONTENT_CN: 公眾人士請注意，爲配合2024沙田單車節，相關源禾路（南行）、火炭路（西行）、大涌橋路（北行）及沙田鄉事會路（東行）將於2024年11月3日（星期日）上午4時至11時45分期間封閉。在上述封路期間，駕駛人士請留意有關道路配置、方向指示標誌、交通標誌及道路標記的交通改道安排。公共交通服務亦會作出調整。詳情請瀏覽有關交通通告（https://www.td.gov.hk/en/traffic_notices/index_id_77780.html）。
